description: Lionel Messi scores from the penalty spot. Argentina 1 - 0 France.
Angel Di Maria scores after a brilliant counter-attack. Argentina 2 - 0 France.
Kylian Mbappe scores from the penalty spot. Argentina 2 - 1 France.
Kylian Mbappe scores a stunning volley to equalize! Argentina 2 - 2 France.
Regular time ends. The match goes to extra time. Argentina 2 - 2 France.
Lionel Messi scores from close range. Argentina 3 - 2 France.
Kylian Mbappe completes his hat-trick from the penalty spot! Argentina 3 - 3 France.
Extra time ends. The World Cup winner will be decided by penalties. Argentina 3 - 3 France.
Argentina wins 4 - 2 on penalties. Argentina are the World Champions!
